revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Suppress categories]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2612 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <includeonly>{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Suppress categories|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <includeonly>{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Suppress categories|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Suppress categories|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
